privacy.1text: At Nexus Nine, we respect our users' privacy...
privacy.2text: We may collect the following data when you use Nexus Nine:
privacy.214: Avatar or profile picture (if provided by the user)
privacy.22: Information generated by the use of the service
privacy.221: Game statistics (games played, wins, losses, scores)
privacy.3text: The collected information is used solely to:
privacy.34: Improve stability, security, and user experience
privacy.3text2: We do not use the data for commercial or advertising purposes.
privacy.41: Passwords are stored encrypted and never in plain text
privacy.42: Data is stored in a protected database
privacy.43: Reasonable technical measures are applied to prevent unauthorized access
privacy.4text: However, no system is 100% secure and absolute security cannot be guaranteed.
privacy.5text: Nexus Nine does not sell, rent, or share personal data with third parties.
privacy.5text2: Data may only be accessed by the project developers for technical or academic purposes.
privacy.6text: As a user, you have the right to:
privacy.63: Request deletion of your account and associated data
privacy.6text2: To exercise these rights, you can delete your account from the application (if available) or contact the project developers.
privacy.7text: Nexus Nine may use cookies or browser local storage to:
privacy.7text2: No tracking or advertising cookies are used.
privacy.8text: This Privacy Policy may be updated as the project evolves.
privacy.8text2: Changes will be published on this same page.
privacy.9text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, you can contact the development team through the project repository.

terms.1text1: By accessing and using Nexus Nine, you agree to these Terms of Service.
terms.1text2: If you do not agree with them, you must stop using the application.
terms.2text1: Nexus Nine is an online card game, inspired by Triple Triad...
terms.2text2: The service is provided for educational purposes and without commercial guarantees.
terms.31: The user is responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their credentials
terms.33: Each user is responsible for the activity carried out from their account
terms.4text1: When using Nexus Nine, the user agrees to:
terms.41: Not use the service for illegal purposes
terms.42: Not attempt to exploit errors, bugs, or vulnerabilities
terms.43: Not interfere with other players' experience
terms.44: Not perform attacks, cheating, or system manipulation
terms.45: Not use inappropriate and/or abusive language
terms.46: Not discriminate based on sex, age, race, religion, or political preference
terms.4text2: Failure to comply with these rules may result in account suspension or deletion.
terms.51: The code, design, and content of Nexus Nine belong to its developers
terms.52: The game is inspired by Triple Triad but is not affiliated with or endorsed by Square Enix
terms.53: All content is used for educational and non-profit purposes
terms.61: The service may not be available at all times
terms.62: It may be interrupted due to maintenance, errors, or modifications
terms.63: Continuous availability or permanent data preservation is not guaranteed
terms.7text1: Nexus Nine is provided “as is”, without warranties of any kind.
terms.7text2: The developers are not responsible for:
terms.73: Damages resulting from the use of the application
terms.8: Modifications to the service or terms
terms.8text1: The developers reserve the right to:
terms.8text2: Modifications will be published on this page.
terms.9text: This project is governed by general principles and is not subject to a specific commercial legal framework, as it is an academic project.
terms.10text: For any questions related to these Terms of Service, you can contact the development team through the project repository.

error.title: Error
error.subtitle: Page not found. The page you are looking for does not exist or an unexpected error occurred.

1.name: Grand Inquisitor
1.description: A ruthless judge of truth and heresy. He seeks out forbidden knowledge, purging the realm of dark magic with an iron fist and absolute resolve.

2.name: Sage of Mana
2.description: A peaceful wanderer carrying the wisdom of centuries. He restores balance to the world, offering quiet guidance and immense magical energy to worthy noble champions.

3.name: Dragon Sorceress
3.description: Channeling the fury of ancient drakes, she commands both spell and scale, blending destructive arcane magic with the primal, burning wrath of legendary winged beasts.

4.name: Mana Alchemist
4.description: A brilliant mind obsessed with magical essence. He distills the world's raw energy into potent elixirs, transforming simple liquids into miracles of unimaginable mystical power.

5.name: Rune Sorceress
5.description: Mastering the forgotten symbols of power, she manipulates the battlefield with glowing seals, unleashing spectacular elemental chaos upon anyone foolish enough to cross her path.

6.name: Runic Wizard
6.description: An elder master of the arcane arts. He reads the universe's fabric, casting complex spells that alter reality and turn the tide of great wars.

7.name: Bronze Owl
7.description: An ancient guardian crafted by forgotten mechanics, it watches the skies with relentless precision, recording every hidden secret within the darkest corners of time.

8.name: Iron Crow
8.description: Forged from discarded armor, this mechanical scavenger spies from the gray clouds, collecting shiny secrets and bringing dark omens to the forgotten battlefield below.

9.name: Shadow Wolf
9.description: A phantom beast formed from the darkest nightmares. It hunts relentlessly under the moonlight, vanishing into the mist before its terrified prey even senses danger.

10.name: Mechanical Spider
10.description: An intricate terror built with clockwork gears and venomous precision. It weaves invisible steel webs, trapping the unwary before striking with lethal, calculated mechanical grace.

11.name: Crystal Snake
11.description: Lurking silently in the glowing caves, this beautiful yet deadly predator strikes with piercing venom, turning the blood of its unfortunate victims into solid glass.

12.name: Smoke Panther
12.description: Born from the ashes of burned forests, this elusive feline strikes with blinding speed. It leaves only a trail of dark smoke and silent devastation.

13.name: Stone Gargoyle
13.description: An animated statue bound to ancient cathedrals. It protects holy grounds from dark intruders, swooping down with crushing weight and unbreakable, cold, stony granite resolve.

14.name: Iron Colossus
14.description: A towering monument of enchanted metal. This indestructible juggernaut crushes entire armies under its heavy steps, serving as the ultimate bastion of ancient earthly defense.

15.name: Soul Forger
15.description: A mysterious blacksmith dwelling in the underworld. He hammers the spirits of the dead into powerful, eternal weapons, binding mortal courage to cold, unforgiving steel.

16.name: Arcane Dragon
16.description: Forged in the primordial fires of magic, this ancient creature controls the raw elements, bringing absolute devastation to those who challenge its boundless power.

17.name: Obsidian Sentinel
17.description: Carved from the darkest volcanic stone, this silent watcher stands eternal guard. It awakens only when ancient realms face absolute ruin and inevitable fiery destruction.

18.name: Runic Leviathan
18.description: A monstrous titan of the deep, inscribed with glowing ancient runes. Its massive roar commands the ocean, sinking mighty fleets into the dark, watery abyss.

19.name: Mana Shield
19.description: Woven from pure arcane threads, this barrier absorbs devastating magical impacts, protecting the brave bearer by turning incoming destruction into harmless bursts of radiant light.

20.name: Wandering Core
20.description: A sentient sphere of pure, unstable magic. It floats aimlessly across the ruined lands, discharging volatile elemental energy at anyone foolish enough to come close.

21.name: Compass of Shadows
21.description: A cursed artifact that never points north. Instead, it guides the bearer towards their deepest fears, revealing unseen pathways hidden within the dark void.

22.name: Runic Sword
22.description: Forged by master dwarven smiths, its glowing blade cuts through armor and magic alike. It empowers the wielder with the legendary strength of fallen heroes.

23.name: Orb of Vision
23.description: A glowing sphere containing trapped starlight. It peers through the thickest illusions, revealing hidden enemies, lost treasures, and the deepest secrets of the forgotten past.

24.name: Chalice of Energy
24.description: A sacred vessel forged to hold the purest essence of life. Those who drink from it are granted unimaginable strength and boundless, eternal vitality.
